headlines.headline: Holtum Asset Group secures $120M contract with a national infrastructure agency

sentiment.reasoning: Securing a $120M contract provides a clear, quantifiable boost to revenue and long-term visibility.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
